data.title: Argo Group Limited Concludes Tender Offer and Announces AIM Delisting
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Argo Group Limited ( (GB:ARGO) ) is now available.

Argo Group Limited has announced the results of its recent Tender Offer, which closed on February 18, 2025. The company offered to purchase up to 28.8% of its issued share capital, and successfully repurchased 4,294,580 shares, representing 11% of the share capital. These shares will be canceled, and the company’s total voting rights will now be 34,665,406. Additionally, Argo will cancel the trading of its ordinary shares on AIM, with the last trading day set for February 20, 2025. Directors Michael Kloter and Kenneth Watterson participated in the offer, selling 1,000,000 and 88,141 shares, respectively.

More about Argo Group Limited

YTD Price Performance: 25.00%

Average Trading Volume: 19,796

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £1.95M

data.title: Prime US REIT Announces Upcoming Distribution for Investors
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Prime US REIT ( (SG:OXMU) ).

Prime US REIT has announced a distribution of 0.11 U.S. cents per unit for its investors, scheduled for payment on March 28, 2025. This distribution is categorized as U.S. source portfolio interest, with no effectively connected income or return of capital, reflecting the company’s ongoing strategy to provide returns through its diversified real estate investments in the U.S.

More about Prime US REIT

Prime US REIT is involved in the real estate investment trust (REIT) industry, focusing on acquiring and managing a diversified portfolio of income-producing commercial properties in the United States. Its primary service is providing investors with opportunities to participate in the ownership of U.S. real estate assets, primarily through units listed on the Singapore Exchange.

data.title: Kitwave Group PLC Voting Rights Change Notification
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Kitwave Group PLC ( (GB:KITW) ) has provided an update.

Kitwave Group PLC, a UK-based company, has experienced a change in its voting rights holdings due to a disposal by Ameriprise Financial, Inc., a Minneapolis-based financial services company. The company’s voting rights have decreased from 12.892% to 9.276%, with the transaction crossing the threshold on February 14, 2025, and the notification being issued on February 18, 2025. This reduction in holdings might impact Kitwave’s shareholder dynamics and influence within the company.

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from B&M European Value Retail SA ( (GB:BME) ).

B&M European Value Retail SA announced a change in its voting rights structure due to security lending activities. GIC Private Limited, based in Singapore, has increased its voting rights in the company to 5.998025%, enhancing its influence and potential decision-making power within the company. This change in holdings could impact the company’s governance and its strategic decisions moving forward.

More about B&M European Value Retail SA

B&M European Value Retail SA operates as a variety retailer, primarily focusing on the sale of discount products in the European market. The company offers a range of products including homeware, food, and garden items, catering to cost-conscious consumers.

data.title: Prominence Energy Initiates Bowsprit-1 Site Abandonment
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Prominence Energy Limited ( (AU:PRM) ) has shared an announcement.

Prominence Energy Limited has commenced the abandonment and site remediation of the Bowsprit-1 Project Lease, following the decision to relinquish the lease. The company has appointed Petroleum Coordinators Inc. to manage the project, with Select Oilfield Services LLC and Gulf Inland Inc. assisting in the plug and abandonment operations, ensuring an efficient and safe process.

More about Prominence Energy Limited

Prominence Energy Limited is an Australian Securities Exchange listed company based in Perth, focusing on high ROI opportunities in conventional oil and gas, as well as emerging sectors like Helium, Green Energy, and Green Hydrogen. The company holds interests in the Gulf of Mexico and has investments in uranium and solution-mined salt caverns for energy reserves and carbon capture.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Mare Group Announces Shareholders’ Meeting with Key Agenda Items
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) has shared an announcement.

Mare Group S.p.A. has announced the publication of the notice for its upcoming Ordinary and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, which will address several key agenda items. These include the adoption of stock-option and stock grant plans, the delegation of authority to the Board of Directors to increase share capital, and the provision of variable compensation for executive board members. The decisions made at this meeting could significantly impact the company’s financial strategies and shareholder engagement.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Mare Engineering Group S.p.A. is a digital engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan. It operates in Italy and internationally, focusing on innovation through enabling technologies.
